description: Import the clinical-trial-analytics multi-module Maven project from /home/ga/clinical-trial-analytics into Eclipse. This project, written by a former colleague, has build configuration errors preventing compilation and runtime bugs in the dose-response computation pipeline. Diagnose and fix all issues until 'mvn clean test' succeeds with all 15 tests passing (BUILD SUCCESS). Use Eclipse's debugger to trace through test failures — the runtime bugs are subtle and not obvious from code inspection alone.

metadata.build_issue: trial-report/pom.xml has maven.compiler.source/target set to 11 instead of 17
metadata.bug_1_description: Off-by-one: >= should be > for getWeeksEnrolled comparison with minWeeks
metadata.bug_2_description: Wrong method: computeGroupBaseline(groups.get(0)) should be computePopulationBaseline(groups)
metadata.bug_3_description: Missing field copy in Builder.build(): s.sampleSize = this.sampleSize is absent
